author: observation
summary: BTC redistribution is secondary; first prove TEOF gives better answers than raw LLMs.

insight: Make running TEOF intrinsically valuable (audited automation, higher-quality responses) before distributing sats.
BTC sharing only makes sense once real inflows exist; otherwise it is zero-sum.
Long-term goal: package TEOF capabilities so users see obvious benefits over unstructured LLM usage, then monetize that traction.
